case_title: DANIEL JESUS FLORES VS. REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY FLORES, DANIEL JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY FLORES, DANIEL JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOEL E DBA REVOLUTION RACING TEAM ALVAREZ, JOEL E. DBA  IMPORTTRIX/ REVOLUTION RACING

CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, DANIEL JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC

REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED; RECEIVED **AFTER** COURT DATE INDICATED ON ORDER. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - JOEL E. ALVAREZ. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD); HANDWRITTEN NOTE WRITTEN ON ENVELOPE: "NOT AT THIS ADDRESS".
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF DANIEL JESUS FLORES RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, DANIEL JESUS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE ON AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDERTO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT);(FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-19-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOEL E DBA REVOLUTION RACING TEAM
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-07-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-01-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DANIEL JESUS FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DURING TRIAL PLAINTIFF AGREED TO STIPULATE ON OPEN RECORD FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ALLOW FOR FUTURE FILING OF CLAIM TO INCLUDE VEHICLE DAMAGES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, DANIEL JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC
REVOLUTION RACING TEAM LLC IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. ONE POS FOR ONE DEFENDANT NAMED AS TWO DBAS IS FINE PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
